name: fund_transfer
description: Fund an existing transfer from your Wise multi-currency balance. This is the final step that actually moves the money after a transfer has been created. The transfer must be in 'incoming_payment_waiting' status.

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Your Wise profile ID (personal or business). This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: transferId
parameters.description: The ID of the transfer to fund. This is a path parameter.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The payment method. Use 'BALANCE' to pay from your Wise balance.
